core_mechanism: Reparameterizing an intractable high-dimensional Bayesian inverse problem through a learned low-dimensional latent code — a generator that decodes latent variables into full high-dimensional realizations — so that the posterior can be sampled efficiently by MCMC in the compressed latent space
brief_reason: The abstract states that the trained generator defines a very low-dimensional parameterization which thereby enables efficient probabilistic (MCMC) inversion of a problem that is otherwise computationally prohibitive in the original high-dimensional space.
